tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "UbuntuComputer_Egress_Allowlist"
        set member "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "Allow_UbuntuComputer_Validated_Egress"
        set srcintf "LAN"
        set dstintf "WAN"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS" "HTTP" "DNS" "NTP"
        set nat enable
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 0
        set name "Deny_UbuntuComputer_General_Egress"
        set srcintf "LAN"
        set dstintf "WAN"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer_192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
show firewall policy"}
